text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the spring Tenno Sho has arrived, and
Super Creek is getting wound up by Tamamo
Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross even threatens to whomp me so
badly that I'll never recover.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to protect me, Super Creek takes on
the race against Tamamo Cross with her heart
ablaze.
